nasb.text: Then Samuel took a stone and set it between Mizpah and Shen, and named it Ebenezer, saying, “Thus far the Lord has helped us.”

esv.text: Then Samuel took a stone and set it up between Mizpah and Shen and called its name Ebenezer; for he said, “Till now the Lord has helped us.”

cnv.text: 撒母耳搬來了一塊石頭，把它豎立在米斯巴和善之間，給這塊石頭起名叫以便以謝，說：“直到現在，耶和華都幫助我們。”

ccb.text: 撒母耳拿了一块石头放在米斯巴和善的中间，称之为以便以谢，说：“耶和华到如今都帮助我们。”
